insights.title: Answer Engine Insights
insights.description: Monitor how your brand is represented in AI-generated answers.

content.description: AI-powered content recommendations to improve your visibility in AI-generated answers.

detail.notSentYet: Not sent to any workflow yet.

competitors.title: Competitors
competitors.description: Manage competitors and compare AI visibility head-to-head.
competitors.name: Name
competitors.selectToCompare: Select a competitor to see head-to-head comparison.
competitors.emptyDescription: Add competitor domains to compare their AI visibility against yours across all AI platforms.
competitors.addDescription: Enter the competitor's name and website domain to start tracking their AI visibility.
competitors.confirmDeleteDescription: This will stop tracking {name} and remove it from your competitor list. Historical comparison data for this competitor will remain in past results but cannot be linked back to a competitor record.
competitors.upgradeDescription: Upgrade your plan to track competitor AI visibility and compare your brand's performance across AI platforms.
competitors.noBrandDescription: Select or create a brand to start tracking competitors.

h2h.title: {brand} vs {competitor}
h2h.promptByPromptDesc: Click a prompt to expand and see per-platform breakdown.
h2h.noGaps: No gaps found — you're ahead on all prompts!
h2h.noStrengths: No strengths found — competitor leads on all prompts.
h2h.noPromptData: No prompt-level data available. Run a tracking check first.
h2h.noDataDescription: Run a tracking check from the Insights page to generate comparison data for this competitor.

citations.title: Citations
citations.description: Domains and URLs that AI platforms cite when mentioning you — and your competitors.
citations.kpiAvgPerResultSub: Number of links per AI answer
citations.noBrandDescription: Select or create a brand to see the citations AI platforms use when answering about it.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Export and share your AI visibility reports.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your project and account settings.
settings.themeDescription: Choose light or dark mode for the dashboard.
settings.billingDescription: Manage your subscription and billing details.
settings.changePlanConfirmDescription: You will be switched to the {plan} plan at ${price}/mo. Proration will be applied to your next invoice.
settings.cancelConfirmDescription: Your subscription will remain active until the end of the current billing period. After that, you will lose access to paid features.
settings.customPlanDescription: Get unlimited brands, custom integrations, dedicated support, and more.

hero.title: Your Brand in Every AI Answer
hero.subtitle: Monitor, analyze, and optimize your brand's visibility across ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, Claude, and more.

features.title: Everything you need for AI visibility

insights.title: Answer Engine Insights
insights.description: Track your brand mentions and citations across all major AI platforms in real time.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free, scale as you grow. Self-host with all features unlocked, or let us handle the infrastructure.
pricing.ossDescription: Self-host the entire platform for free with all features unlocked. No artificial limits, no license keys. Use our cloud when you want us to handle the infrastructure.
